SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.chemistry.scale

Class BrineMixingScaleEvaluator.BrineComposition

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.scale.BrineMixingScaleEvaluator.BrineComposition
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
BrineMixingScaleEvaluator
public static class BrineMixingScaleEvaluator.BrineComposition extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable ion analysis of a brine (all concentrations in mg/L).

  • Constructor Details

    • BrineComposition

      public BrineComposition(double calciumMgL, double bariumMgL, double strontiumMgL, double magnesiumMgL, double sodiumMgL, double potassiumMgL, double chlorideMgL, double sulphateMgL, double bicarbonateMgL)
      Creates a brine composition from ion concentrations in mg/L.
      Parameters:
      calciumMgL - calcium concentration [mg/L]
      bariumMgL - barium concentration [mg/L]
      strontiumMgL - strontium concentration [mg/L]
      magnesiumMgL - magnesium concentration [mg/L]
      sodiumMgL - sodium concentration [mg/L]
      potassiumMgL - potassium concentration [mg/L]
      chlorideMgL - chloride concentration [mg/L]
      sulphateMgL - sulphate concentration [mg/L]
      bicarbonateMgL - bicarbonate concentration [mg/L]
